vocab.example: Some high-end brands now offer a virtual fitting room to help customers visualize how the shoes look on their feet.
The biggest risk of shopping on unofficial platforms is inadvertently purchasing counterfeit goods instead of authentic products.

vocab.meaning: đánh giá từ người tiêu dùng
vocab.example: I always scrutinize consumer reviews to check if the footwear runs true to size before hitting the checkout button.

vocab.meaning: giao diện thân thiện với người dùng
vocab.example: I prefer websites with a user-friendly interface that allows me to filter by material, color, and price range easily.
The sheer convenience of doorstep delivery is what keeps me addicted to buying sneakers through mobile apps.
Online shopping enables effortless price comparison across multiple retailers, ensuring I always get the best deal.
I only shop on reputable sites that use a secure payment gateway to protect my credit card information.
E-commerce platforms are excellent for discovering niche brands that aren't stocked in local department stores.
I usually wait for the seasonal clearance to buy winter boots at significantly discounted prices.
There are now online services that allow you to customize bespoke shoes by choosing every detail from the stitching to the sole.
